summary: Script is excellent: set -euo pipefail, proper quoting, IFS handling, error function, clear exit codes. Workflow is solid but has issues: (1) actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to commit SHA (line ~23)—best practice for supply-chain security requires full 40-char SHA; (2) manifest detection checks only fixtures/manifest.{json,txt} but not config/mock—if those are missing, script exits 3 before creating report.txt, causing 'cat report.txt' to fail (line ~60-64). Should verify all fixtures in detect step or make report print defensive. Otherwise well-structured, readable, appropriate scoping.
